title: Entity Encounters — travel-archetype roll call from the Asia summer trip
html:
Entity Encounters — travel-archetype roll call from the Asia summer trip

Source: 2024-07-02 Apple Note. Yahir's character-sketch ledger from the start of the 2024 Asia summer trip — quick portraits of strangers caught in transit.

TL;DR

  • Leroy (US Virgin Islands yapper) — loves Trump, claims Obama did 9/11.
  • Young Black kid asking who's the best soccer player, then random "skibidi toilet."
  • Drunk Indian man on flight to Delhi, perma-banned mid-flight; flight attendants asked Yahir to swap seats.
  • Jose — dreadlocked Acapulco worker who does yoga, no deadlines.
  • Leon — Malaysian-Sydney retired surveyor on first solo trip; soft spot for China.
  • Indian bus driver KL → Singapore who locked Yahir in the bus at a pit stop, got pissed at the joke about it.
  • Guatemalan Edgar the tour guide who likes saying his full name.

Pattern observed

Yahir's travel-anthropology mode: collects strangers as character-cards. Same impulse drives the Egyptian taxi scam taxonomy and the advanced countries comparative analysis. He inventories people the way some travelers inventory restaurants — to extract pattern.

This is also the earliest entity-list with "Entity" in the title — proto-vocabulary for the wiki itself. The note is doing exactly what wiki/entities/ is meant to do, but in raw form.

Open questions

  • "Edgar (Guatemalan tours)" — was he hired? Worth a Memory.md entry?
  • Did Leroy actually believe Obama did 9/11 or was he yapping? Yahir doesn't editorialize.

Related

  • 2024 08 14 travel occurrences
  • 2024 08 31 determinants of advanced countries
  • 2023 09 06 egypt jordan itinerary — same observation mode
  • character archetypes from travel
